name: Minionese: Comprehensive Benchmark and Mechanistic Study of Multilingual LLM Safety
summary: arXiv:2607.10112v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safety alignment in large language models remains brittle across languages: prompts reliably refused in English can elicit harmful compliance in no...
description: arXiv:2607.10112v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safety alignment in large language models remains brittle across languages: prompts reliably refused in English can elicit harmful compliance in non-English and low-resource settings. We introduce \textsc{Minionese}, a multilingual jailbreak benchmark spanning 18 languages, 4 resource tiers, and 4 perturbation types (standard translation, code-s...
author: Chigozirim Ifebi, Brent Kong, Ayushi Mehrotra
